reviews.comment:
El playero nos discriminó por ser diferentes y nos dijo que el patrón no lo deja ayudar a la gente . Linda gente en Dolores pero este chico es pesimo , bien el acá reclutando

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendant discriminated against us for being different and told us his boss doesn't let him help people. The people in Dolores are nice, but this guy is awful. Good for him recruiting here.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1dnRuVFdnEAE

reviews.comment:
fue un lío lleno de autos los espacios para discapacitado ocupados por autos que no tenían la oblea exhibida en el parabrisas,  gente peleando por un lugar para estacionar la verdad no estuvo buena esa parada los baños sin papel no jabón

(Translated by Google)
It was a mess, full of cars, the disabled parking spaces were occupied by cars that didn't have the sticker displayed on the windshield, people were fighting over parking spots. Honestly, that bus stop wasn't good. The bathrooms had no toilet paper or soap.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1bnE3eWVREAE

reviews.comment:
